response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with roughly 15+ years of development experience and genuine developer-tooling credentials (test runners like Trial and Fluent-Asserts, CI/GitLab infrastructure, Selenium training, MCP code generators), but the role is a Level II people-management position and the resume shows no formal people management, no direct reports, and no organizational-change leadership. Technical leadership is implied through founding GISCollective and staff-level titles, yet there is no evidence of roadmap ownership, performance management, or team development at the scale this role requires. Mobile exposure exists (iOS/Apple TV) but is dated and secondary.
strengths: Deep hands-on developer-tools background: test frameworks, CI/CD infrastructure, device orchestration, and AI/MCP tooling
15+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Strong engineering-culture contributions: TDD advocacy, workshops, courses, and open-source project ownership
concerns: No demonstrated people management or direct-report experience (role requires 2+ years)
No evidence of formal technical leadership of teams or leading organizational change
Mobile-platform experience is limited and nearly a decade old, while the role centers on a large mobile ecosystem

key_factors.factor: Developer tools and testing infrastructure expertise
